title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF SAWMILL, MUNICIPALITY OF AROROY, PROVINCE OF MASBATE, TO CONCEPCION.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5557 / 53 OG No. 16, 5152 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1737, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF SAWMILL, MUNICIPALITY OF AROROY, PROVINCE OF MASBATE, TO CONCEPCION.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Sawmill, Municipality of Aroroy, Province of Masbate, is changed to Concepcion.

SEC 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
